metadata.scene_summary: At the river crossing, a ferryman offers one safe route, while a second path follows bells no one else seems to hear.
metadata.sanity_question: Do you pay for certainty, chase the omen, or retreat before the choice worsens?

options.label: Pay the ferryman and cross under guard

add_events: The ferryman refused to meet your eyes, but he got you across.

options.label: Follow the bells into the marsh

add_events: You found the bells. You still do not know who was ringing them.

options.label: Step back and camp before dusk

add_events: You gave the river one more night to decide whether it wanted you.
